pattern: Scan digits left to right; at the first drop, decrement the offending earlier digit and flood the remaining positions with nines to keep the value maximal yet monotone.
hints: If the digits are already non-decreasing the number itself is the answer.
Find the leftmost place where a digit exceeds the one after it.
Decrement the digit just before the violation and set everything to its right to nine, propagating the decrement back through equal digits.

stress.description: random integers across the full range
stress.note: covers values up to the constraint maximum
